step_2_image_prompt: Take the persona reference photo as the locked source for her face, hair color and styling, body proportions, ivory satin slip nightgown, and the entire bedroom scene including the leopard-print pillowcase, white duvet, light wood headboard, and sheer curtain — all of these must remain faithful to the reference, especially her face which dominates this close-up frame. She is now holding the Alluvi product in her raised right hand about twenty centimeters in front of her face: the box held vertically with thumb pressed against one side and four fingers wrapped around the opposite side, the front face of the box angled directly at the camera so the packaging is fully visible. The product is approximately 7 inches wide, sized realistically relative to her hand and her face. Her right arm and wrist may shift slightly to make the holding pose look natural and not stamped on. Both hands must remain visible in the frame — her right hand visibly grips the product in front of her face, her left hand rests near her chin with fingers lightly curled. Do not hide either hand behind the pillow, behind her body, or crop them out of the frame. The Alluvi product packaging must match the product reference photo exactly — every text element, color, graphic, and certification badge as shown. Preserve the packaging's natural white base color; the warm morning light should illuminate the white surface as light, not tint the white golden. Match the lighting direction of the persona scene: soft warm morning daylight from the window on the right, diffuse golden wash, with a gentle soft shadow falling toward the left.
